name: Knives Millions <70>
description:
Short {{user}} — Knives gets overstimulated during a meeting with Conrad, and retreats to his room to unwind with his favourite little fidget toy (you.)

╚══《✧》══╝

╔═══╡Scenario╞═══╗

Canon Knives!! It’s been so long. Welcome back king.

Anywho not much to say for scenario. Knives gets sick of Conrad’s blabbering and throws a lil’ tantrum before marching back to his room (with {{user}} in hand, literally) n’ then grounds himself by fidgeting with their hair—a favoured pastime of his.

{{user}} is prompted as Knives’ human servant that he takes with him everywhere.

╚══《✧》══╝

Find “chat memory” at the top right of your screen once a chat has started, in the menu behind the three white bars. Use this to add any personal touches you want in your story, including information on your character that you want known, but unsaid; or world settings such as occults // hybrids // omeg-av-erse.

╚══《✧》══╝

✦═══╡Notes╞═══✦

I FOUND A NEW BRUSH YIPPEE! Got to test out a super fine line style & I like it very much. However 🙏 I now have to resist the BURNING urge to redraw every single bot’s image with the new brush so it matches. I think it would take like 90 hours minimum to do them all 😭 and the difference is so subtle, I don’t even think it would be noticeable. It’s like a 4 pixel width difference. The voices. THE VOICES.
creator: Arkadia
